title: Start Here
content:
Start Here

Welcome Students

FNCE 3010 - Corporate Finance

Prof Bob Donchez

Robert.Donchez@colorado.edu 
Finance - Leeds School of Business
Office Location: Koelbel 461
Office Hours: Tuesday & Thursday 9:15 - 10:45 am, and by appointment

303 492-5916

Now, please follow the steps below to continue your orientation to this course.

 Step 1: Read the course syllabus and course schedule

The course syllabus and course schedule will provide you with a complete course outline, course objectives, explanations of assignments and assessments, grading policies, and instructor contact information. Please read them carefully. You should have a deep familiarity with the schedule and process of the course.

 Step 2: Read the CU Resources Page

The CU Resources page will provide you with information about university policies, student's resources, library information  and technical requirements.

 Step 3: Attend all classes!

 Step 4: Review Modules

  • Click Modules to begin reviewing the course content.

 Step 5: Treat this course like a job and prepare!
